replies.msg:
To all people around the world,

We, Hongkongers just experienced a terrorist attack planned and executed by our local Police Force. At about 10pm today (August 31, 2019), the police rushed into railway platforms in Prince Edward station, got into the carriages and indifferently beat up all the people inside, regardless of whether they were protesters or simply passengers.

They ignored the weapons guidelines and fired tear gas indoors inside the carriages, which can be in fact, lethal. Innocent passengers were attacked by batons and pepper sprays and many were seriously injured. Some passengers kneeled before them asking them to stop but the response they got was even more violence from the police. After the attacks, however, the police did not arrest any passengers, clearly indicating that the only purpose for their brutality was to vent their anger and emotions, and them choosing to resort to violence, instead of simply dispersing the crowd.

We are experiencing a humanitarian crisis and we hope that everyone around the globe can help us in any way you can think of. Thank you and we will stay strong.

Hongkongers

#fightforfreedomstandwithhongkong
